name: competitive-analysis
description: Multi-angle competitive research producing a SWOT and positioning summary
whenToUse: When evaluating a product, company, or technology against competitors

phases.title: Scope
phases.detail: Define target and 5 research angles

phases.title: Research
phases.detail: Parallel research: product / pricing / reviews / community / roadmap

phases.title: SWOT
phases.detail: Synthesize strengths, weaknesses, opportunities, threats

phases.title: Position
phases.detail: Produce positioning recommendations

name: tech-evaluation
description: Scored technology evaluation across DX, performance, security, ecosystem, and community
whenToUse: When choosing between technologies, frameworks, or libraries for a project

phases.title: Scope
phases.detail: Define candidates and evaluation criteria

phases.title: Evaluate
phases.detail: 5 parallel dimension agents per candidate

phases.title: Score
phases.detail: Build weighted scoring matrix

phases.title: Recommend
phases.detail: Produce ranked recommendation with trade-offs

name: ai-model-eval
description: 4-parallel model benchmark agents → scoring matrix → cost/performance recommendation
whenToUse: When choosing between AI models or providers for a use case

phases.title: Scope
phases.detail: Define evaluation criteria and test prompts for the use case

phases.title: Benchmark
phases.detail: 4 parallel model evaluators (quality / reasoning / speed / cost)

phases.title: Score
phases.detail: Scoring matrix across all dimensions

phases.title: Recommend
phases.detail: Ranked recommendation with break-even cost analysis

name: ux-heuristic-audit
description: 10 Nielsen heuristics parallel audit → severity ranking → fix brief
whenToUse: When auditing a UI for usability issues using Nielsen's 10 heuristics

phases.title: Scope
phases.detail: Define target UI and identify key user flows to audit

phases.title: Audit
phases.detail: 10 parallel heuristic evaluators — one per Nielsen heuristic

phases.title: Rank
phases.detail: Severity ranking of all violations by impact on user experience

phases.title: Brief
phases.detail: Prioritized fix brief with specific design recommendations

name: competitive-teardown
description: 5 parallel competitor angle agents → pipeline synthesis into competitive positioning report
whenToUse: When doing a deep competitive teardown across product, tech, pricing, hiring, and community

phases.title: Scope
phases.detail: Identify competitors and define evaluation framework

phases.title: Research
phases.detail: 5 parallel competitor angle agents: product/tech/pricing/hiring/community

phases.title: Analyze
phases.detail: Synthesize competitive landscape from all angles

phases.title: Synthesis
phases.detail: Competitive positioning report with differentiation opportunities

name: code-audit
description: Parallel security + quality + performance audit with adversarial finding verification
whenToUse: When you need a comprehensive code review before a release or security review

phases.title: Scope
phases.detail: Build file list from git diff or path argument

phases.title: Audit
phases.detail: 3 parallel auditors: security / quality / performance

phases.title: Verify
phases.detail: Adversarial verification of high-severity findings

phases.title: Report
phases.detail: Risk-ranked report with actionable remediation

name: feature-planner
description: Sequential pipeline: brief → PRD → architecture → user stories
whenToUse: When starting a new feature and need a complete specification before coding

phases.title: Brief
phases.detail: Clarify goals, users, success criteria

phases.title: PRD
phases.detail: Generate product requirements document

phases.title: Architecture
phases.detail: Design technical architecture and data flow

phases.title: Stories
phases.detail: Break into implementation user stories

name: pr-review
description: 4-dimensional parallel PR review: correctness, security, performance, style → consensus verdict
whenToUse: When you want a thorough multi-perspective review of a pull request or diff

phases.title: Scope
phases.detail: Read diff and build review context

phases.title: Review
phases.detail: 4 parallel reviewers: correctness / security / performance / style

phases.title: Consensus
phases.detail: Merge findings, deduplicate, score severity

phases.title: Verdict
phases.detail: Produce APPROVED / CHANGES REQUIRED verdict with findings

name: tdd-sprint
description: Strict Red-Green-Refactor TDD loop with spec-first discipline
whenToUse: When implementing a feature or fix using test-driven development methodology

phases.title: Spec
phases.detail: Define behavior requirements and acceptance criteria

phases.title: Red
phases.detail: Write failing test that captures the requirement

phases.title: Green
phases.detail: Write minimal code to make the test pass

phases.title: Refactor
phases.detail: Clean up while keeping tests green, verify all pass

name: refactor-plan
description: Technical debt scan → risk-sorted sequence → safe refactor implementation plan
whenToUse: When you need to plan a refactoring safely without breaking existing behavior

phases.title: Scan
phases.detail: Identify technical debt, complexity hotspots, dead code

phases.title: Prioritize
phases.detail: Risk-sort by blast radius and test coverage

phases.title: Sequence
phases.detail: Order changes to minimize merge conflicts

phases.title: Plan
phases.detail: Produce step-by-step refactor plan with verification gates

name: test-coverage-gap
description: Parallel per-module coverage analysis → gap map → prioritized test-writing plan
whenToUse: When you need to find and fix test coverage gaps across a codebase or module

phases.title: Discover
phases.detail: Map modules and identify testable units

phases.title: Analyze
phases.detail: Parallel coverage analysis per module

phases.title: GapMap
phases.detail: Synthesize gaps by severity and risk

phases.title: Plan
phases.detail: Prioritized test-writing plan with concrete test cases

name: api-contract-test
description: Writer/Reviewer pattern: spec reader vs implementation reader → contract violation report
whenToUse: When validating that an API implementation matches its OpenAPI/GraphQL/Protobuf spec

phases.title: ReadSpec
phases.detail: Parse the API specification (OpenAPI/GraphQL/Protobuf/docs)

phases.title: ReadImpl
phases.detail: Read the actual implementation in a fresh context

phases.title: Diff
phases.detail: Cross-reference spec contracts vs implementation

phases.title: Report
phases.detail: Violation report with severity and fix instructions

name: debug-detective
description: 4-hypothesis parallel investigation → evidence gathering → scientific RCA
whenToUse: When debugging a hard-to-reproduce bug or production issue with unclear root cause

phases.title: Intake
phases.detail: Document symptoms, context, and reproduction steps

phases.title: Hypothesize
phases.detail: 4 parallel hypothesis agents from different angles

phases.title: Evidence
phases.detail: Parallel evidence gathering per hypothesis

phases.title: RCA
phases.detail: Scientific root cause analysis from evidence

phases.title: Fix
phases.detail: Targeted fix plan with regression test spec

name: writer-reviewer
description: Anthropic Writer/Reviewer pattern: implement in Context A → fresh Context B reviews the diff
whenToUse: When you want unbiased code review — a fresh context reviewer has no bias toward code it did not write

phases.title: Implement
phases.detail: Writer agent implements the requested change

phases.title: Review
phases.detail: Fresh reviewer agent inspects only the diff without implementation context

phases.title: Verdict
phases.detail: Accept / request-changes verdict with specific actionable feedback

name: mutation-testing
description: Mutant generator → parallel kill-test agents → mutation score + survival report
whenToUse: When evaluating test suite effectiveness by checking if tests catch deliberate code mutations

phases.title: Analyze
phases.detail: Identify mutable source lines: conditions, operators, return values

phases.title: Mutate
phases.detail: Generate 10-15 specific mutation descriptions

phases.title: Kill
phases.detail: Parallel kill-test per mutation — would existing tests catch it?

phases.title: Report
phases.detail: Mutation score report with killed/survived/timeout breakdown

name: code-explainer
description: Structural map → domain extraction → architecture patterns → guided narrative tour for onboarding
whenToUse: When onboarding to an unfamiliar codebase or explaining a complex module to a new developer

phases.title: Structure
phases.detail: Map file structure, entry points, and module boundaries

phases.title: Domain
phases.detail: Extract domain concepts, business logic, and key abstractions

phases.title: Architecture
phases.detail: Identify architectural patterns, data flow, and design decisions

phases.title: Tour
phases.detail: Synthesize a guided narrative tour for a new developer

name: design-system-audit
description: 5 parallel dimension auditors (spacing/color/typography/icons/a11y) → consistency score
whenToUse: When auditing a frontend codebase for design system consistency and token usage

phases.title: Inventory
phases.detail: Discover design tokens, component files, and styling approach

phases.title: Audit
phases.detail: 5 parallel dimension auditors: spacing, color, typography, icons, accessibility

phases.title: Score
phases.detail: Aggregate consistency scores per dimension and overall

phases.title: Report
phases.detail: Design system health report with specific violation fixes

name: incident-response
description: Parallel investigation across logs, metrics, traces, and code → mitigation → RCA → postmortem
whenToUse: When responding to a production incident or unexpected system failure

phases.title: Alert
phases.detail: Characterize the incident: impact, scope, timeline

phases.title: Investigate
phases.detail: 4 parallel agents: logs / metrics / traces / code changes

phases.title: Mitigate
phases.detail: Identify and apply immediate mitigation steps

phases.title: RCA
phases.detail: Root cause analysis and postmortem document

name: release-prep
description: Automated release pipeline: tests → changelog → version bump → PR → announcement draft
whenToUse: When preparing a production release and need all release artifacts generated

phases.title: Check
phases.detail: Run tests, verify no uncommitted changes, check CI status

phases.title: Changelog
phases.detail: Generate changelog from commits since last release

phases.title: Bump
phases.detail: Update version in all required files

phases.title: PR
phases.detail: Create release PR and draft announcement

name: dependency-health
description: Parallel per-dependency audit (CVEs / licenses / staleness / maintenance) → risk matrix
whenToUse: When auditing dependencies before a release, security review, or due diligence

phases.title: Inventory
phases.detail: Extract full dependency tree from package manifests

phases.title: Audit
phases.detail: Parallel audit per batch: CVEs, license risk, staleness, maintenance status

phases.title: RiskMatrix
phases.detail: Consolidate into risk matrix with severity tiers

phases.title: Action
phases.detail: Prioritized upgrade / replace / accept recommendations

name: database-migration
description: Schema diff → risk analysis → migration scripts → rollback plan
whenToUse: When planning or reviewing a database schema migration

phases.title: SchemaDiff
phases.detail: Parse current and target schema, compute structural diff

phases.title: RiskAnalysis
phases.detail: Assess data loss risk, locking impact, and rollback complexity

phases.title: Scripts
phases.detail: Generate forward migration + rollback scripts

phases.title: Runbook
phases.detail: Step-by-step production runbook with verification checks

name: multi-repo-sync
description: Parallel per-repo audit → cross-repo divergence map → sync plan
whenToUse: When managing multiple related repos and need to find/fix divergence in shared config, deps, or conventions

phases.title: Discover
phases.detail: List target repos and their relationships

phases.title: Audit
phases.detail: Parallel audit per repo for divergence from the reference

phases.title: DivergenceMap
phases.detail: Cross-repo divergence map with severity

phases.title: SyncPlan
phases.detail: Prioritized sync plan — what to align and how

name: cost-analysis
description: Parallel infra/API/query/bundle cost agents → reduction plan with ROI estimates
whenToUse: When analyzing and reducing infrastructure, API, database, or bundle costs

phases.title: Scope
phases.detail: Identify cost centers and establish current baseline

phases.title: Analyze
phases.detail: 4 parallel cost dimension agents: infra / API / database / bundle

phases.title: Model
phases.detail: Cost model with reduction opportunities and ROI estimates

phases.title: Plan
phases.detail: Prioritized cost reduction plan with implementation steps

name: onboard-codebase
description: Map structure → domain analysis → architecture → generate guided tour and onboarding docs
whenToUse: When joining a new codebase or onboarding a team member to an existing repo

phases.title: Map
phases.detail: Discover file structure, languages, entry points

phases.title: Domain
phases.detail: Identify business domains and core abstractions

phases.title: Architecture
phases.detail: Map layers, data flow, and key patterns

phases.title: Tour
phases.detail: Generate guided tour and onboarding documentation

name: perf-optimize
description: Profile → parallel bottleneck hunt across DB/network/CPU/memory → prioritized fix plan
whenToUse: When an application is slow and you need to find and fix performance bottlenecks

phases.title: Profile
phases.detail: Establish baseline metrics and identify slow paths

phases.title: Identify
phases.detail: 4 parallel agents: DB queries / network / CPU / memory

phases.title: Plan
phases.detail: Prioritize fixes by impact-to-effort ratio

phases.title: Benchmark
phases.detail: Define verification benchmarks for each fix

name: architecture-modernization
description: Legacy architecture map → target design → migration sequencing → risk gates
whenToUse: When planning a major architecture overhaul: monolith-to-services, framework upgrade, or platform migration

phases.title: Map
phases.detail: Map current architecture: components, dependencies, coupling, pain points

phases.title: Design
phases.detail: 3 parallel target architecture proposals with trade-off analysis

phases.title: Select
phases.detail: Judge panel selects best design, synthesizes hybrid

phases.title: Sequence
phases.detail: Migration sequencing with risk gates and rollback checkpoints

phases.title: Roadmap
phases.detail: Sprint-by-sprint modernization roadmap

name: documentation-gen
description: Parallel per-file doc generation → style normalization → publish-ready documentation
whenToUse: When generating or refreshing documentation for a codebase, API, or module

phases.title: Scope
phases.detail: Discover files needing documentation

phases.title: Generate
phases.detail: Parallel doc generation per file/module

phases.title: Normalize
phases.detail: Style consistency pass across all generated docs

phases.title: Publish
phases.detail: Assemble README, API reference, and changelog entries

name: api-migration
description: Breaking change detection → versioning strategy → migration guide → compatibility matrix
whenToUse: When planning or communicating an API version migration to consumers

phases.title: Detect
phases.detail: Detect breaking vs non-breaking changes between old and new API versions

phases.title: Version
phases.detail: Propose versioning strategy: semver, URL versioning, or header versioning

phases.title: Guide
phases.detail: Generate migration guide for API consumers

phases.title: Matrix
phases.detail: Compatibility matrix: which client versions work with which API versions

name: data-pipeline-validate
description: Pipeline stage-by-stage validation → data quality gates → anomaly detection report
whenToUse: When validating a data pipeline for correctness, completeness, and quality before production use

phases.title: Map
phases.detail: Map all pipeline stages from source to sink

phases.title: Validate
phases.detail: Parallel validation per stage (schema / completeness / transforms / outputs)

phases.title: Quality
phases.detail: Data quality gate assessment — freshness, completeness, consistency

phases.title: Report
phases.detail: Validation report with stage health scores and fix recommendations

name: security-hardening
description: 5-angle OWASP parallel scout → 3-vote adversarial verification → threat model + remediation roadmap
whenToUse: When hardening a codebase before a security review, pentest, or production launch

phases.title: Scope
phases.detail: Define attack surface and target context

phases.title: Scout
phases.detail: 5 parallel OWASP/CWE dimension scouts

phases.title: Verify
phases.detail: 3-vote adversarial verification per critical finding

phases.title: ThreatModel
phases.detail: STRIDE threat model from confirmed findings

phases.title: Roadmap
phases.detail: Prioritized remediation roadmap with severity/effort matrix

name: accessibility-audit
description: WCAG 2.2 parallel per-criterion audit → 3-vote adversarial verify failures → remediation spec
whenToUse: When auditing a UI for WCAG 2.2 compliance before launch, legal review, or accessibility certification

phases.title: Scope
phases.detail: Define target UI and map components/pages to audit

phases.title: Audit
phases.detail: 6 parallel WCAG principle auditors (Perceivable/Operable/Understandable/Robust + ARIA + Keyboard)

phases.title: Verify
phases.detail: 3-vote adversarial verification of all Level A and AA failures

phases.title: Spec
phases.detail: Remediation spec with exact ARIA attributes, HTML fixes, and WCAG references

name: security-threat-model
description: Asset inventory → STRIDE threat enumeration → parallel mitigations → CVSS-style score matrix
whenToUse: When threat modeling a system architecture, API, or new feature before building

phases.title: Assets
phases.detail: Inventory system assets, data flows, and trust boundaries

phases.title: STRIDE
phases.detail: 6 parallel STRIDE threat agents — one per threat category

phases.title: Mitigate
phases.detail: Parallel mitigation agent per identified threat

phases.title: Score
phases.detail: CVSS-style risk score matrix with remediation priority
